description: Style Note This kurta from aurelia embodies a relaxed aesthetic look that incorporates subtle ethnic design details. Balance the sober pattern with a bright colour pop denims or an intricate stole. We recommend ethnic flats in metallic tones for your feet. Product Details Green kurta with vertical stripes, has a mandarin collar with a split V, mock placket with stitched detail around it, short sleeves with stitched detail at the cuffs, side slits and a stitched pattern above the hemline Material and Care 100% cotton Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Hot iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
